feature_name: Cockpit Mode — Inter-Slot Message Bus + Chairman Feed
description: Bus de messages SQLite permettant aux AgentSlots de communiquer entre eux. Feed Chairman en temps réel synthétisant l'état global du projet. Les agents ne sont plus sourds l'un à l'autre.
goals: Permettre à chaque slot de publier et recevoir des messages typés
Implémenter le Chairman Feed : agrégation des messages → synthesis en temps réel
Afficher le feed et le chat par slot dans l'UI Cockpit

user_stories.title: AgentMessage persistence + MessageBusService
user_stories.description: As the message bus, I need AgentMessage persisted in SQLite and a MessageBusService actor that handles publish/subscribe for all active slots.
acceptance_criteria: AgentMessage table created with FK to AgentSlot and CockpitSession (cascade delete)
MessageBusService actor exposes publish(message:fromSlot:) and subscribe(toSession:) methods
Messages typed: status, question, blocker, completion, chairman_brief
Subscribers notified via AsyncStream on new messages

tests.desc: Should keep AgentMessage linked to AgentSlot
Should keep AgentMessage linked to CockpitSession with cascade delete

unit_test.name: test_message_bus_publish_subscribe
unit_test.description: Validates AgentMessage persistence and pub/sub mechanics
assertions: should persist AgentMessage to SQLite on publish
should notify subscribers via AsyncStream on new message
should cascade delete messages on slot removal

user_stories.technical_notes: MessageBusService as Swift actor with GRDB.swift. AsyncStream<AgentMessage> per session subscription. message_type enum enforced at DB level.

user_stories.title: Slot message publisher — agent emits structured messages
user_stories.description: As an AgentSlot, I need to emit structured messages on the bus so that other slots and the Chairman can react to my status, blockers, and completions.
acceptance_criteria: PTYProcessRunner parses agent stdout for structured message patterns (JSON lines prefixed with [XROADS:])
Parsed messages published to MessageBusService automatically
AgentSlot.current_task updated on status message type
Blocker message type triggers slot status display update in UI

tests.desc: Should parse and publish structured message from agent stdout

unit_test.name: test_slot_message_publisher
unit_test.description: Validates structured message extraction from agent stdout
assertions: should detect [XROADS:] prefix in stdout line
should parse JSON payload and create AgentMessage
should update AgentSlot.current_task on status message

user_stories.technical_notes: SKILL.md injects instruction: emit [XROADS:{type:status|blocker|completion|question, content:string}] lines. PTYOutputParser extracts these. No regex — swift Codable JSON decode.

user_stories.title: Chairman Feed aggregator — real-time project synthesis
user_stories.description: As the Chairman, I need to read all AgentMessages from active slots, synthesize the project state, and produce a chairman_brief message every N messages or on demand.
acceptance_criteria: ChairmanFeedService subscribes to MessageBusService for the active CockpitSession
Every 5 new messages or on blocker: call cockpit-council Chairman with context
Chairman synthesis published as AgentMessage type chairman_brief
Chairman brief stored in CockpitSession.chairman_brief field
Brief includes: active agents status, blockers, decisions recommended, action items

tests.desc: Should update CockpitSession.chairman_brief after Chairman synthesis

unit_test.name: test_chairman_feed_aggregator
unit_test.description: Validates Chairman synthesis trigger and brief storage
assertions: should trigger synthesis after 5 new messages
should trigger synthesis immediately on blocker message
should publish chairman_brief to message bus

user_stories.technical_notes: ChairmanFeedService as Swift actor. Synthesis: call cockpit-council Python with aggregated messages as context. Debounce synthesis calls with 2s minimum interval.

user_stories.title: Cockpit UI — chat panel per slot + Chairman feed display
user_stories.description: As a user, I need to see the message feed per slot and the Chairman brief panel so I can interact with each agent and understand the project state at a glance.
acceptance_criteria: Each slot card has an expandable chat panel showing its AgentMessage history
User can type a message to the slot — injected into agent stdin
Chairman Feed panel (right sidebar or top bar) shows latest chairman_brief
Unread messages count badge on each slot card

tests.desc: Should display AgentMessages in slot chat panel filtered by AgentSlot

unit_test.name: test_cockpit_chat_panel_ui
unit_test.description: Validates chat panel display and user message injection
assertions: should display messages filtered by AgentSlot
should inject user message to agent stdin
should refresh chairman_brief on session update

user_stories.technical_notes: SlotChatPanel SwiftUI view. @Observable SlotChatViewModel. User message → PTYProcessRunner.sendInput(). Chairman panel driven by @Observable CockpitSessionViewModel.

functional_requirements.description: Messages structurés uniquement — pas de stdout brut dans le bus
Chairman synthesis non-bloquante — agent continue pendant la délibération
User peut interagir avec chaque slot sans interrompre les autres
Messages persistés — feed récupérable après restart

technical_considerations: AsyncStream<AgentMessage> pour le real-time sans polling
Chairman synthesis via cockpit-council subprocess — async, non-bloquant
GRDB.swift observation pour les updates SQLite temps réel
success_metrics: Agent status visible dans le slot en moins de 500ms après émission
Chairman brief produit en moins de 5 secondes après trigger
0 message perdu entre publish et subscriber notification
User message injecté dans agent stdin en moins de 200ms
